seo.title: 6 Reasons Why You Lost Money Today in Trading
seo.description: Losing trades often come down to psychology rather than strategy. This article breaks down the most common mistakes like emotional trading, lack of planning, and poor risk management and shows how understanding your behavior can improve long-term performance.
